title: One Simple Trick To Beat Procrastination
script:
Struggling to get started? [Visual: default.mp4]
Try the two minute rule. [Visual: default.mp4]
If a task takes less than two minutes, do it right now. [Visual: default.mp4]
For bigger tasks, commit to just the first two minutes. [Visual: default.mp4]
Want to work out? [Visual: default.mp4]
Just put on your shoes. [Visual: default.mp4]
Starting is the hardest part. [Visual: default.mp4]
Small actions build unstoppable habits. [Visual: default.mp4]
Follow for more tips. [Visual: default.mp4]
